description:
Delete the 6 AST-shaped helpers in src/typer.rs that have no live consumer:

- expr_calls_self
- pattern_type
- pattern_bindings
- extract
- expr_to_map_key
- pattern_to_map_key

## Do NOT delete the widen* family

widen / widen_map / widen_map_sig / widen_tuple / widen_list / widen_func ARE used: src/ir_typer.rs:519 calls crate::typer::widen from specialize_return. The "never used" warnings on widen* are transitive — they fire only because specialize_return itself shows as dead. Once .11.25.7 annotates specialize_return with #[allow(dead_code)], the widen* warnings clear automatically.

Keep widen* exactly as-is. Step 7 handles the cascade.

## Side effect for Step 4 (MapKey::Bool / MapKey::Nil)

expr_to_map_key and pattern_to_map_key are the ONLY constructors of MapKey::Bool and MapKey::Nil. After this step lands, those variants have zero constructors — which is what fz-ul4.11.25.4 relies on.

## Deliverable

- 6 functions deleted.
- Net -6 warnings (the widen* warnings clear in .11.25.7).
- cargo test passes.
- typer.rs shrinks but does not disappear; mod typer stays in main.rs.
title: Delete AST-shaped typer orphans (keep widen* family)
